summary: An outstanding audience‑sourced recording that captures a sweet, attentive crowd and delivers an excellent overall show.
review: Both reviewers rave about the immersive presence of the audience, noting crystal‑clear crowd vocals that make you feel like you're right there. The recording is praised as surpassing many soundboard tapes, and the performance itself is described simply as great, with no specific drawbacks mentioned.

ai_rating.rationale: Consistently 5‑star reviews highlight superb audience presence and an excellent listening experience; both show quality and recording quality are portrayed as top‑tier.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Very clear crowd vocals, superb sense of presence; reviewers claim it feels like being there and even better than many board recordings.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Not specifically described; reviewers simply note the show was great overall.
